name: SHUSEN: CHIBOUNUSHI (DEFENSIVE TECHNIQUE: RISING MUD GUARDIAN)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Doton)

Rank: 3

Chakra Cost: 2

Learn DC: 16 | Successes: 2

Perform: 4 | Perform DC: 16

Components: C, H, Mas

You must be standing directly on rocky ground, earth or asphalt to use this technique, which creates a thin wall of mud or earth in a square in range. Any creature directly behind it can use it to be granted one-half cover (if the creature is Medium sized) or three-fourths cover (if the creature is Small or smaller).

Once a single attack or area of effect has been made against a target that is granted cover against it by the wall, the wall crumbles, even if it did not negate any damage.

Mastery: Each step increases the number of times per day you can use this technique as a defensive maneuver by 1.

The first step allows you to defend against sources of a CR up to 5. Each additional step increases the CR by 5.
